description_long: This is a modern beachfront bungalow set on a sandy lot with direct access to the water. The structure features a flat roof, white exterior walls, and large open archways, with a main building and a detached smaller structure. The property includes outdoor amenities such as palm trees, lounge chairs, a shaded gazebo, and a hammock, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The main building has multiple rooms, visible windows, and a spacious open area facing the beach. The layout is open and airy, with minimalistic landscaping and a clear separation between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes relaxation and leisure, blending indoor comfort with outdoor living.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed beachfront bungalow with open archways, palm trees, and outdoor leisure areas including a gazebo and hammock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow, detached structure, palm trees, lounge chairs, and gazebo by the water.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main building's length, interior room divisions, and the proximity of the gazebo and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open archway, detached structure, and the arrangement of outdoor furniture and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the gazebo, hammock, and the open sandy area leading to the main entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows on multiple facades
